# Enso Labs
> Enterprise AI consulting firm, agentic systems studio, and financial AI agent lab in New York City.

## About
Enso Labs is a principal-led enterprise AI consulting firm founded by Sav Banerjee in New York City. We deliver AI transformation consulting, agentic AI development, cloud managed services, and production AI systems for Healthcare, Finance, Advertising, and B2B Technology — then build the production systems that deliver it.

## Services
- Enterprise AI Transformation Consulting (https://ensolabs.ai/services)
- Agentic AI Consulting & AI Agent Development
- Claude Managed Services & Cloud AI (https://ensolabs.ai/services/claude-managed-services)
- Financial AI & Agentic Trading Systems (https://ensolabs.ai/industries/financial-services)
- AI Strategy Consulting in New York City (https://ensolabs.ai/locations/new-york)
- Healthcare AI & Pharma Compliance
- AI Advertising & Marketing Automation

## Products
- signal2noise (https://ensolabs.ai/insights): Daily AI market intelligence, scored and curated — published on the Enso Labs Insights page
- Enso Trading Terminal (https://ensolabs.ai/work/trading-terminal): Autonomous financial AI agents, signal intelligence, options trading

## Case Studies
- https://ensolabs.ai/work/gore — AI Market Intelligence Platform (Fortune 500 manufacturer)
- https://ensolabs.ai/work/heller — AI Center of Excellence for Pharma
- https://ensolabs.ai/work/trading-terminal — Autonomous Trading Terminal
- https://ensolabs.ai/work/enterprise-ai — Enterprise AI Enablement Programs
